name: agent-workflows
description: Portable Codex and Claude workflow pack for ShakaCode repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Portable Codex and Claude workflows for PR batches, reviews, CI, and audits.
interface.longDescription: Portable Codex and Claude skills for PR batch planning, review triage, merge readiness, changelog updates, CI routing, and audit loops. Consumer repositories supply their own local agent workflow contract.
